content:
Day 18: Understanding Credibility & Research
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Review Chapter 7, Section 1 on research writing. Find two sources on a topic of your choice—one credible, one questionable. Compare their arguments and analyze what makes one stronger than the other.

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

Why is credibility important in research-based writing? Using Chapter 7, Section 5, explain how research enhances critical thinking.

🔹 Connecting Prompt:

Think about a time you believed misinformation because of a misleading source. How can we ensure that the research we use is reliable?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:

Imagine you are an investigative journalist uncovering a major story. What research methods would you use to verify facts before publication?


Day 19: The Power of Evidence & Logical Reasoning
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.
